== Notes for [[Item:Q111900|Q111900]] ==

-https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Goto_Mu%C3%B1oz



*daughter of https://www.geni.com/people/Munio-Guterres-de-Celanova-III-Conde-del-Sobrado/6000000021801820504
* Not daughter of https://www.geni.com/people/Munio-o-Nu%C3%B1o-Guti%C3%A9rrez-Conde-de-Celanova/6000000002487912490 (problematic abandoned MP DIY node)

----------

*https://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/Galicia.htm#GutierreMenendezdied933MIlduaraErizB

c) ''' GOTO Muñoz''' (-after 1 Mar 963). “Sancius...Domini Ordonii genitus” granted property to the church of Santiago by charter “XI Kal Dec” dated to 927, confirmed by “Goto Regina”[373]. “Santius rex et Goto regina” granted property to Odoario by charter dated 20 Feb 928[374]. “Ansuario” donated property to “domino nostro et…rex domno Santius…Gallecie princeps…et domina nostra…Goto regina” by charter dated 10 Jun 929[375]. "Ranimirus rex" donated "la villa de Pinies en tierra de Salnés", which "genitore nostro dive memorie domino Ordonio principi" had granted to "congermano nostro Munius Gutierri", to "cognate nostre domine Gotho regina et Deo vota…in cenobio Castrello" by charter dated 947[376]. “La reina y confesa Goto, hija de Munio” donated property “situado bajo la ´Penna Polumbaria´, en el puerto de Pombeiro” to the monastery of San Vicente de Pombeiro (Lemos) by charter dated 1 Mar 963[377].

'''m''' (before 927) SANCHO Ordóñez, son of ORDOÑO II King of León & his first wife Elvira Menéndez ([890/93] or later-929).

-------

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
